CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INTEGER, big_num BIGNUM);
SELECT id, big_num FROM test_numbers WHERE big_num > 4000000000000000000000;
SELECT SUM(big_num) FROM test_numbers WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_numbers WHERE big_num < 5000000);
INSERT INTO additional_numbers (big_num) VALUES (CAST(3.402823466e+38 AS BIGNUM));
SELECT a.id, a.big_num, b.big_num FROM test_numbers a JOIN additional_numbers b ON a.id = 1 WHERE b.big_num > 10000;
INSERT INTO additional_numbers (big_num) SELECT big_num * 2 FROM test_numbers WHERE id = 2;
SELECT MAX(big_num) FROM test_numbers WHERE big_num BETWEEN 1 AND 1234567890;
WITH temp AS (SELECT id, big_num FROM test_numbers WHERE big_num < 100000000) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp;
SELECT DISTINCT big_num FROM test_numbers WHERE id <= 2 ORDER BY big_num ASC;
INSERT INTO test_numbers (id, big_num) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (), (1000000 + CAST(RANDOM() * 1000000 AS INTEGER)) FROM range(1, 100);
